llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Company raises share buyback price to ₹1,260 per share, reduces share count to 87.30 lakh shares, for a total consideration not exceeding ₹1,100 crore. Promoters to participate. Also reported 14.6% YoY increase in consolidated net profit for Q4, with revenue climbing to ₹7,587 crore and strong growth in consumer wellness.

Government advises state-run oil marketing companies to work on infrastructure for dispensing E20, E22, E25, and E30 ethanol-blended fuels, indicating future business expansion and alignment with energy security policies.
